channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Defense spending, China in Asia and lessons from Ukraine: Takeways from the 2026 IISS Shangri-La Dialogue
item.description: The summit sees top world leaders, defence officials and key executives gathering in Singapore from May 29 to 31

item.title: Oil exports through the Strait of Hormuz might not return to levels seen before the Iran war
item.description: Iran's blockade of the Strait of Hormuz has seriously challenged freedom of navigation in the sea lane, raising questions about the future.

item.title: Analysis: An end to the Iran war may be just the beginning of a new era of U.S. inequality
item.description: Stocks have boomed while consumers have paid the costs of high energy prices.

item.title: Disney is poised to ramp its already booming advertising business. Rita Ferro is behind the push
item.description: Disney is selling ads for the Super Bowl, Oscars and Grammys in 2027, all major advertising revenue drivers. Global ad president Rita Ferro is leading the charge.

item.title: Two months, $2.6 billion: How NASA ETF turned SpaceX IPO access into a hot retail trade
item.description: With Elon Musk's SpaceX IPO ahead, retail investors are rushing into space-themed ETFs including NASA which offers direct access to the rocket company.

item.title: Micron is one of the most overbought stocks after this week’s rally to new highs
item.description: Investors poured love into stocks such as Micron Technology and Dell Technologies this week.

item.title: Trump ends Iran meeting without announcing ‘final determination’ on deal
item.description: Trump's Truth Social statement left unclear which of his conditions are already part of a deal that negotiators are working on to pause the U.S.-Iran war.

item.title: Meta has struggled at selling anything other than ads. Will AI be different?
item.description: Meta is making a major push to expand its business beyond online advertising, but past efforts show that success is far from guaranteed.

item.title: Josh Brown, counting on a new momentum strategy, thinks investors want more than index funds
item.description: Brown debuted a separately managed account named after a premium cut of steak — built to hold what he considers the market's best opportunities.

item.title: Stocks including Nvidia and Apple are top picks as market run-up continues, Bank of America says
item.description: Bank of America named some of its favorite stocks to buy in June.

item.title: Travelers to Europe may be leaving money on the table. Here's why
item.description: Travelers to Europe who buy certain merchandise can claim a refund of the value-added taxes they pay.

item.title: At least 3.5 million people have lost food stamp access as Trump's 'big beautiful bill' cuts take effect, analysis finds
item.description: Even as Americans confront higher costs, millions of people have lost Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program food benefits.

item.title: CNBC's Official Global Soccer Team Valuations 2026: Here's how the top 30 clubs in the world stack up
item.description: The world's 30 most valuable soccer teams are worth an average of $2.66 billion, according to CNBC's official team valuations.

item.title: DOJ seeks Judge Eleanor Ross recusal in Georgia election case, citing reports she was disciplined
item.description: The DOJ is suing Georgia Secretary of State Brad Raffensberger over his refusal to give the department election records.

item.title: Will Gen Z be the generation to revive moviegoing?
item.description: Gen Zers like affordable, social experiences and are driving demand for anime and video game titles at the theaters.

item.title: Trump to headline 'Great American State Fair' for nation's 250th anniversary after artists drop out
item.description: In a post on Truth Social on ‌Saturday, the president suggested the concert series may no longer ‌be necessary if performers continue to back out.

item.title: Morgan Stanley says these 'dividend hopefuls' are poised to outperform if they initiate a payout
item.description: Dividend stocks may help boost investor returns over time, and Morgan Stanley thinks a number of companies are in a position to begin paying them.

item.title: Hegseth praises Asian allies for 'burden-sharing,' calls out China's role in the region
item.description: Hegseth said that China cannot impose its hegemony on U.S. partners and allies in the region.

item.title: Trump plans to appeal order allowing all importers that paid struck-down tariffs to seek refunds
item.description: The Trump administration said it intended to appeal a judge's order allowing all companies that paid the invalidated duties to seek refunds.

item.title: Jim Cramer says Dell’s blowout quarter sets up a crucial week for AI stocks
item.description: CNBC’s Jim Cramer said Dell Technologies’ blockbuster quarter reignited enthusiasm around AI and data center stocks.

item.title: 3 themes that drove stocks to another week of records — and a banner month
item.description: The S&P 500 extended its winning streak to nine weeks.

item.title: A record number of Americans are funding Roth IRAs — here’s how to open one
Berkshire trails red-hot S&P 500 by biggest margin so far this year
item.description: Berkshire's widely held B shares are now running 16.3 percentage points behind the benchmark index year-to-date, the biggest gap so far in 2026.

item.title: Roth IRA owners may need a second retirement account to claim the new Saver's Match
item.description: The Saver's Match program, which starts in 2027, is for lower- and moderate-income retirement savers — but Roth IRA owners may face a hurdle to get the money.

item.title: Student loan borrowers will have two new repayment options come July 1. Here's how to pick one
item.description: Starting July 1, millions of federal student loan holders will have two new ways to repay their debt. Here's what to know about the additional options.

item.title: U.S. support for Taiwan reaffirmed by members of Congress even after Trump called arms sales a 'negotiating chip' with China
item.description: President Donald Trump has referred to $14 billion in arms sales to the island, which has been approved by Congress, as a "negotiating chip" with China.

item.title: This Trump-linked startup plans to put humanoid robots in the military
item.description: With ties to the Trump family, Foundation Robotics Labs is aiming to deploy humanoid robots in the military in the next 12 to 18 months.

item.title: Dell stock skyrockets 32% for its best day ever as AI server revenue soars
item.description: Dell reported its fastest pace of revenue growth since returning to the public market in 2018, with AI server revenue soaring 757% over last year.

item.title: Trump’s physician says the president is in 'excellent health' and is 'fully fit' to serve
item.description: Trump underwent a CT scan and other heart imaging, along with cancer screenings and other preventative assessments carried out by 22 specialists.

item.title: Michael Dell courted Trump early. His company has reaped rewards
item.description: The dynamic is emblematic of how business is seeking to sow favor with the president in his second term, and has departed from the norms of big business philanthropy.
